englishDefinitions: (colloquial) Excessively concerned with rules and order, always serious.
persianTranslation: (عامیانه) بیش از حد نگران قوانین و نظم، همیشه جدی.
examples: Don't be so uptight! You won't go to jail for crossing the street against the light.
He came from a very uptight religious background, but you wouldn't know that now!
